sources.title: The Covered Wagon  1923
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

metadata.Plot: Two wagon caravans converge at what is now Kansas City, and combine for the westward push to Oregon. On their quest the pilgrims will experience desert heat, mountain snow, hunger, and indian attack. To complicate matters further, a love triangle develops, as pretty Molly must chose between Sam, a brute, and Will, the dashing captain of the other caravan. Can Will overcome the skeleton in his closet and win Molly's heart?
metadata.Actors: J. Warren Kerrigan, Lois Wilson, Alan Hale
